ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Vendor_Form", $Profile.Name <> "SW Billing", $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended", $User.SYSFullID__c <> '0056700000AkJRjAAN', /*integrationsystems@similarweb.com*/ OR( AND( ISNEW(), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Submitted")) ), AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(Status__c), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Recall")) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose "Submitted" in the Status field, only "SW Billing" profile has permissions to edit this field
